area_anchor: Brikette — Staff have no way to see how well the AI drafts are performing or how fast emails get resolved
current_truth: The reception inbox records telemetry events (drafted, sent, resolved, admitted) in ThreadEventRow but has no dashboard, summary view, or reporting surface. Staff and operators have no visibility into draft quality pass rates, average resolution time, or volume trends over time.
next_scope_now: Investigate which metrics matter most for inbox operations, how to compute them from existing telemetry, and what UI surface best fits the reception app.
adjacent_later: Alerting when draft quality rate drops below a threshold
Weekly digest email summarizing inbox performance
evidence_refs: operator-stated: no visibility into draft quality rates, resolution times, or volume trends
why: Staff and operators have no way to tell whether the AI email drafts are getting better or worse over time. They cannot see how long it takes to resolve a guest enquiry, how many drafts pass quality checks, or whether email volume is trending up. Without this visibility, problems go unnoticed until a guest complains. An analytics dashboard would give the team confidence that the system is working and flag issues early.

intended_outcome.statement: A validated next action exists for inbox analytics, with required metrics, computation approach, and UI surface identified.
